title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
title_es: Amazon invierte $5B más en Anthropic con acuerdo de $100B
bajada: Amazon realizó una nueva inversión de $5 mil millones en Anthropic, mientras que la startup se comprometió a gastar $100 mil millones en servicios de AWS. Este acuerdo refuerza la posición de Anthropic como competidor clave en el mercado de IA y consolida la alianza entre ambas compañías.
bajada_en: Amazon made another $5 billion investment in Anthropic, while the startup committed to spending $100 billion on AWS services. This deal strengthens Anthropic's position as a key competitor in the AI market and consolidates the alliance between both companies.

title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
summary: OpenAI launches Codex Transformation Partners, a program with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle.
title_es: OpenAI expande Codex a empresas con partners globales
bajada: OpenAI lanzó Codex Transformation Partners, un programa con Accenture, PwC e Infosys para ayudar a empresas a desplegar y escalar Codex en el ciclo de vida del desarrollo de software. Esta iniciativa democratiza el acceso a herramientas de IA para coding a nivel empresarial.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched Codex Transformation Partners, a program with Accenture, PwC, and Infosys to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle. This initiative democratizes access to AI coding tools at the enterprise level.

title: Autonomous AI at Scale: Adobe Agents Unlock Breakthrough Creative Intelligence With NVIDIA and WPP
summary: AI agents are transforming how work gets done across all industries, accelerating everything from content creation to decision-making. NVIDIA’s expanded strategic collaborations with Adobe and WPP are bringing agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations across creative production and customer experience orchestration.  As demand for personalized customer experiences surges, brands require intelligent systems […]
title_es: Adobe, NVIDIA y WPP colaboran en agentes IA para marketing
bajada: NVIDIA, Adobe y WPP amplían su colaboración estratégica para llevar agentes IA agentic al centro de las operaciones de marketing empresarial. La iniciativa busca automatizar la producción de contenido y orquestación de experiencias de cliente con sistemas inteligentes.
bajada_en: NVIDIA, Adobe, and WPP expand their strategic collaboration to bring agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations. The initiative aims to automate content production and customer experience orchestration with intelligent systems.

title: DeepER-Med: Advancing Deep Evidence-Based Research in Medicine Through Agentic AI
summary:
arXiv:2604.15456v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Trustworthiness and transparency are essential for the clinical adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare and biomedical research. Recent deep research systems aim to accelerate evidence-grounded scientific discovery by integrating AI agents with multi-hop information retrieval, reasoning, and synthesis. However, most existing systems lack explicit and inspectable criteria for evidence appraisal, creating a risk of compounding errors and making it difficult for researchers and clinicians to assess the reliability of their outputs. In parallel, current benchmarking approaches rarely evaluate performance on complex, real-world medical questions. Here, we introduce DeepER-Med, a Deep Evidence-based Research framework for Medicine with an agentic AI system. DeepER-Med frames deep medical research as an explicit and inspectable workflow of evidence-based generation, consisting of three modules: research planning, agentic collaboration, and evidence synthesis. To support realistic evaluation, we also present DeepER-MedQA, an evidence-grounded dataset comprising 100 expert-level research questions derived from authentic medical research scenarios and curated by a multidisciplinary panel of 11 biomedical experts. Expert manual evaluation demonstrates that DeepER-Med consistently outperforms widely used production-grade platforms across multiple criteria, including the generation of novel scientific insights. We further demonstrate the practical utility of DeepER-Med through eight real-world clinical cases. Human clinician assessment indicates that DeepER-Med's conclusions align with clinical recommendations in seven cases, highlighting its potential for medical research and decision support.
title_es: DeepER-Med: Agentes IA para investigación médica basada en evidencia
bajada: Investigadores presentaron DeepER-Med, un framework que usa agentes IA para investigación profunda en medicina con criterios explícitos de apreciación de evidencia. Incluye DeepER-MedQA, un dataset de 100 preguntas de investigación médica de nivel experto, mejorando la confiabilidad de IA en healthcare.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced DeepER-Med, a framework using agentic AI for deep medical research with explicit evidence appraisal criteria. It includes DeepER-MedQA, a dataset of 100 expert-level medical research questions, improving AI reliability in healthcare.

title: LACE: Lattice Attention for Cross-thread Exploration
summary:
arXiv:2604.15529v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Current large language models reason in isolation. Although it is common to sample multiple reasoning paths in parallel, these trajectories do not interact, and often fail in the same redundant ways. We introduce LACE, a framework that transforms reasoning from a collection of independent trials into a coordinated, parallel process. By repurposing the model architecture to enable cross-thread attention, LACE allows concurrent reasoning paths to share intermediate insights and correct one another during inference. A central challenge is the absence of natural training data that exhibits such collaborative behavior. We address this gap with a synthetic data pipeline that explicitly teaches models to communicate and error-correct across threads. Experiments show that this unified exploration substantially outperforms standard parallel search, improving reasoning accuracy by over 7 points. Our results suggest that large language models can be more effective when parallel reasoning paths are allowed to interact.
title_es: LACE: Atención cruzada para razonamiento paralelo coordinado en LLMs
bajada: Investigadores propusieron LACE, un framework que permite que múltiples caminos de razonamiento paralelos en LLMs se comuniquen y corrijan errores mutuamente. Los resultados muestran mejoras de más de 7 puntos en precisión de razonamiento comparado con búsqueda paralela estándar.
bajada_en: Researchers proposed LACE, a framework that enables multiple parallel reasoning paths in LLMs to communicate and correct errors mutually. Results show improvements of over 7 points in reasoning accuracy compared to standard parallel search.

title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners
summary:

This repository includes 50+ language translations which significantly increases the download size. To clone without translations, use sparse checkout: Bash / macOS / Linux: git clone --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners.git cd ai-agents-for-beginners
git sparse-checkout set --no-cone ' /* ' ' !translations ' ' !translated_images ' CMD (Windows): git clone --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners.git cd ai-agents-for-beginners
git sparse-checkout set --no-cone " /* " " !translations" "! translated_images " This gives you everything you need to complete the course with a much faster download. If you wish to have additional translations languages supported are listed here 🌱 Getting Started This course has lessons covering the fundamentals of building AI Agents. Each lesson covers its own topic so start wherever you like! There is multi-language support for this course. Go to our available languages here . title_es: Microsoft lanza curso gratuito: Agentes IA para principiantes
bajada: Microsoft publicó 'AI Agents for Beginners', un curso gratuito disponible en más de 50 idiomas que enseña fundamentos de construcción de agentes IA. El recurso democratiza el acceso a educación en tecnología de agentes, uno de los temas más relevantes de 2025.
bajada_en: Microsoft published 'AI Agents for Beginners', a free course available in 50+ languages teaching AI agent building fundamentals. The resource democratizes access to education on agent technology, one of 2025's most relevant topics.

title: QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard
title_es: Hugging Face lanza ranking de LLMs en árabe QIMMA
bajada: Hugging Face presentó QIMMA, un leaderboard enfocado en la calidad de modelos de lenguaje en árabe. Esta iniciativa busca mejorar la disponibilidad y evaluación de LLMs en idiomas no anglosajones, ampliando la accesibilidad de IA a comunidades multilingües.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduced QIMMA, a leaderboard focused on the quality of Arabic language models. This initiative aims to improve availability and evaluation of LLMs in non-English languages, expanding AI accessibility to multilingual communities.

title: How to Ground a Korean AI Agent in Real Demographics with Synthetic Personas
title_es: Guía: Agentes IA coreanos con personas sintéticas NVIDIA
bajada: NVIDIA y Hugging Face publicaron una guía sobre cómo construir agentes IA en coreano usando personas sintéticas demográficas. El recurso ayuda a developers a crear sistemas IA culturalmente adaptados y localizados para mercados específicos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Hugging Face published a guide on building Korean AI agents using synthetic demographic personas. The resource helps developers create culturally adapted and localized AI systems for specific markets.

title: Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking
summary:
arXiv:2604.16311v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.
title_es: MICE: Extracción multimodal de afirmaciones para verificación de hechos
bajada: Investigadores presentaron el primer benchmark para extracción multimodal de afirmaciones en redes sociales, incluyendo MICE, un framework consciente de intención retórica. El trabajo aborda cómo los modelos multimodales pueden mejor entender desinformación que combina texto e imágenes.
bajada_en: Researchers presented the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, including MICE, an intent-aware framework. The work addresses how multimodal models can better understand misinformation combining text and images.

title: Fortnite developers can make AI characters now — just don’t try to date them
summary: Following last year's AI-powered Darth Vader in Fortnite that swore in a re-creation of James Earl Jones' voice, Epic Games is now letting Fortnite creators experiment with a new "conversations" tool to create AI-powered characters that players can talk and interact with. "Instead of authoring dialogue trees for characters in your islands, conversations transforms an […]
title_es: Epic Games permite crear personajes IA en Fortnite (sin citas románticas)
bajada: Epic Games lanzó una herramienta de 'conversaciones' que permite a creadores de Fortnite generar personajes IA con los que jugadores pueden interactuar. La característica sustituye árboles de diálogo tradicionales, aunque Epic advierte contra intentos de crear relaciones románticas con los bots.
bajada_en: Epic Games launched a 'conversations' tool allowing Fortnite creators to generate AI characters that players can interact with. The feature replaces traditional dialogue trees, though Epic warns against attempting romantic relationships with bots.

title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.
title_es: Google expande Gemini en Chrome a 7 nuevos países asiáticos
bajada: Google lanzó Gemini en Chrome en Australia, Indonesia, Japón, Filipinas, Singapur, Corea del Sur y Vietnam. El despliegue cubre versiones desktop e iOS (excepto Japón) consolidando la presencia de Gemini en mercados clave de Asia-Pacífico.
bajada_en: Google rolled out Gemini in Chrome across Australia, Indonesia, Japan, Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The deployment covers desktop and iOS versions (except Japan), consolidating Gemini's presence in key Asia-Pacific markets.

title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
summary: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.
title_es: NSA usa modelo restringido Mythos de Anthropic pese a disputas
bajada: Reportes indican que la NSA está utilizando Mythos, el modelo IA restringido de Anthropic, a pesar de tensiones previas entre Anthropic y el Pentágono. El uso refleja el creciente interés gubernamental en sistemas IA propietarios de empresas civiles.
bajada_en: Reports indicate that the NSA is using Mythos, Anthropic's restricted AI model, despite previous tensions between Anthropic and the Pentagon. The usage reflects growing government interest in proprietary AI systems from civilian companies.

title: GIST: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Spatial Grounding via Intelligent Semantic Topology
summary:
arXiv:2604.15495v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Navigating complex, densely packed environments like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals poses a significant spatial grounding challenge for humans and embodied AI. In these spaces, dense visual features quickly become stale given the quasi-static nature of items, and long-tail semantic distributions challenge traditional computer vision. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) help assistive systems navigate semantically-rich spaces, they still struggle with spatial grounding in cluttered environments. We present GIST (Grounded Intelligent Semantic Topology), a multimodal knowledge extraction pipeline that transforms a consumer-grade mobile point cloud into a semantically annotated navigation topology. Our architecture distills the scene into a 2D occupancy map, extracts its topological layout, and overlays a lightweight semantic layer via intelligent keyframe and semantic selection. We demonstrate the versatility of this structured spatial knowledge through critical downstream Human-AI interaction tasks: (1) an intent-driven Semantic Search engine that actively infers categorical alternatives and zones when exact matches fail; (2) a one-shot Semantic Localizer achieving a 1.04 m top-5 mean translation error; (3) a Zone Classification module that segments the walkable floor plan into high-level semantic regions; and (4) a Visually-Grounded Instruction Generator that synthesizes optimal paths into egocentric, landmark-rich natural language routing. In multi-criteria LLM evaluations, GIST outperforms sequence-based instruction generation baselines. Finally, an in-situ formative evaluation (N=5) yields an 80% navigation success rate relying solely on verbal cues, validating the system's capacity for universal design.
title_es: GIST: Grounding espacial multimodal para navegación IA encarnada
bajada: Investigadores presentaron GIST, un pipeline de extracción de conocimiento multimodal que convierte nubes de puntos en topologías de navegación semánticamente anotadas. El framework mejora cómo sistemas IA corporificados entienden espacios complejos como retail, almacenes y hospitales.
bajada_en: Researchers presented GIST, a multimodal knowledge extraction pipeline that transforms point clouds into semantically annotated navigation topologies. The framework improves how embodied AI systems understand complex spaces like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals.

title: Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts
summary:
arXiv:2604.15558v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Deliberative multi-agent systems allow agents to exchange messages and revise beliefs over time. While this interaction is meant to improve performance, it can also create dangerous conformity effects: agreement, confidence, prestige, or majority size may be treated as if they were evidence, producing high-confidence convergence to false conclusions. To address this, we introduce PBRC (Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts), a protocol-level mechanism that strictly separates open communication from admissible epistemic change. A PBRC contract publicly fixes first-order evidence triggers, admissible revision operators, a priority rule, and a fallback policy. A non-fallback step is accepted only when it cites a preregistered trigger and provides a nonempty witness set of externally validated evidence tokens. This ensures that every substantive belief change is both enforceable by a router and auditable after the fact. In this paper, (a) we prove that under evidential contracts with conservative fallback, social-only rounds cannot increase confidence and cannot generate purely conformity-driven wrong-but-sure cascades. (b) We show that auditable trigger protocols admit evidential PBRC normal forms that preserve belief trajectories and canonicalized audit traces. (c) We demonstrate that sound enforcement yields epistemic accountability: any change of top hypothesis is attributable to a concrete validated witness set. For token-invariant contracts, (d) we prove that enforced trajectories depend only on token-exposure traces; under flooding dissemination, these traces are characterized exactly by truncated reachability, giving tight diameter bounds for universal evidence closure. Finally, we introduce a companion contractual dynamic doxastic logic to specify trace invariants, and provide simulations illustrating cascade suppression, auditability, and robustness-liveness trade-offs.
title_es: PBRC: Contratos para evitar consenso falso en sistemas multiagente
bajada: Investigadores introdujeron PBRC (Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts), un mecanismo que previene cascadas de conformidad en sistemas multiagente separando comunicación abierta de cambios epistémicos admisibles. Formalmente prueba que no puede haber aumento de confianza basado solo en acuerdo social.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced PBRC (Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts), a mechanism preventing conformity cascades in multi-agent systems by separating open communication from admissible epistemic changes. It formally proves that confidence cannot increase based solely on social agreement.

title: Bureaucratic Silences: What the Canadian AI Register Reveals, Omits, and Obscures
summary:
arXiv:2604.15514v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: In November 2025, the Government of Canada operationalized its commitment to transparency by releasing its first Federal AI Register. In this paper, we argue that such registers are not neutral mirrors of government activity, but active instruments of ontological design that configure the boundaries of accountability. We analyzed the Register's complete dataset of 409 systems using the Algorithmic Decision-Making Adapted for the Public Sector (ADMAPS) framework, combining quantitative mapping with deductive qualitative coding. Our findings reveal a sharp divergence between the rhetoric of "sovereign AI" and the reality of bureaucratic practice: while 86\% of systems are deployed internally for efficiency, the Register systematically obscures the human discretion, training, and uncertainty management required to operate them. By privileging technical descriptions over sociotechnical context, the Register constructs an ontology of AI as "reliable tooling" rather than "contestable decision-making." We conclude that without a shift in design, such transparency artifacts risk automating accountability into a performative compliance exercise, offering visibility without contestability.
title_es: Estudio: El Registro Federal de IA de Canadá oculta silenciosamente
bajada: Análisis del primer Registro Federal de IA de Canadá revela que mientras el 86% de sistemas se usan internamente para eficiencia, el registro oscurece la discreción humana y gestión de incertidumbre real. El trabajo cuestiona cómo diseños de transparencia pueden automatizar la responsabilidad en cumplimiento performativo.
bajada_en: Analysis of Canada's first Federal AI Register reveals that while 86% of systems are used internally for efficiency, the register obscures actual human discretion and uncertainty management. The work questions how transparency designs can automate accountability into performative compliance.

title: ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text
summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0, the newest image-generation model from OpenAI, shows just how much AI capabilities have evolved over the last few years.
title_es: ChatGPT Images 2.0 mejora generación de texto en imágenes
bajada: OpenAI lanzó ChatGPT Images 2.0 con capacidades mejoradas para generar imágenes más detalladas y renderizar texto. El modelo ahora puede buscar información web para crear múltiples imágenes desde un único prompt, aunque todavía tiene limitaciones con idiomas distintos al inglés.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Images 2.0 with enhanced capabilities for generating more detailed images and rendering text. The model can now search the web to create multiple images from a single prompt, though it still struggles with languages other than English.

title: OpenAI’s updated image generator can now pull information from the web
summary: OpenAI is rolling out the latest version of its AI-powered image generator with new "thinking capabilities," allowing it to search the web to help it create multiple images from a single prompt. On Tuesday, OpenAI announced that ChatGPT Images 2.0 can now create more "sophisticated" images, with improvements to its ability to follow instructions, preserve […]
title_es: NeoCognition recauda $40M para desarrollar agentes que aprenden como humanos
bajada: El laboratorio de investigación NeoCognition, fundado por un investigador de OSU, aseguró $40 millones en seed funding para construir agentes de IA que pueden convertirse en expertos en cualquier dominio. El enfoque busca replicar procesos de aprendizaje humano en sistemas autónomos.
bajada_en: NeoCognition, a research lab founded by an OSU researcher, secured $40M in seed funding to build AI agents that can become experts in any domain. The approach aims to replicate human learning processes in autonomous systems.

title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
summary: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.
title_es: Mozilla usó Claude para identificar y reparar 271 bugs en Firefox
bajada: El equipo de Firefox utilizó Mythos de Anthropic para encontrar y solucionar 271 vulnerabilidades en el navegador. Aunque los desarrolladores no creen que la IA cambiará la ciberseguridad a largo plazo, advierten que la industria enfrentará una transición desafiante.
bajada_en: Firefox team used Anthropic's Mythos to find and fix 271 bugs in the browser. While developers don't think AI will revolutionize cybersecurity long-term, they warn the industry faces a rocky transition.

title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 271 Bugs in Firefox
summary: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.
title_es: Meta captura movimientos de ratón y pulsaciones para entrenar IA
bajada: Meta comenzará a capturar movimientos del ratón y pulsaciones de teclado de empleados para recopilar datos de entrenamiento de IA. La iniciativa genera preocupaciones sobre privacidad en el lugar de trabajo y uso de datos de empleados.
bajada_en: Meta will begin capturing employee mouse movements and keystrokes to collect AI training data. The initiative raises privacy concerns about workplace monitoring and employee data usage.

title: Show HN: GoModel – an open-source AI gateway in Go
summary:
Hi, I’m Jakub, a solo founder based in Warsaw.I’ve been building GoModel since December with a couple of contributors. It's an open-source AI gateway that sits between your app and model providers like OpenAI, Anthropic or others.I built it for my startup to solve a few problems:- track AI usage and cost per client or team
  - switch models without changing app code
  - debug request flows more easily
  - reduce AI spendings with exact and semantic cachingHow is it different?- ~17MB docker image
    - LiteLLM's image is more than 44x bigger ("docker.litellm.ai/berriai/litellm:latest" ~ 746 MB on amd64)
  - request workflow is visible and easy to inspect    
  - config is environment-variable-first by defaultI'm posting now partly because of the recent LiteLLM supply-chain attack. Their team handled it impressively well, but some people are looking at alternatives anyway, and GoModel is one.Website:https://gomodel.enterpilot.ioAny feedback is appreciated.Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47849097Points: 148# Comments: 56
title_es: Clarifai elimina 3M de fotos de OkCupid tras acuerdo con FTC
bajada: Clarifai borró 3 millones de fotos que OkCupid proporcionó para entrenar un modelo de reconocimiento facial, como parte de un acuerdo con la FTC. El caso destaca problemas de consentimiento y privacidad en la recopilación de datos para IA.
bajada_en: Clarifai deleted 3 million photos that OkCupid provided for facial recognition AI training as part of an FTC settlement. The case highlights consent and privacy issues in AI data collection.

bajada_en: An independent developer launched GoModel, an open-source AI gateway in Go offering a Docker image 44x smaller than LiteLLM. The tool enables usage tracking, model switching without code changes, and request caching to reduce costs.

title_es: YouTube detecta y permite remover deepfakes de celebridades
bajada: YouTube expandió su función de monitoreo de deepfakes de IA para celebridades de Hollywood. La plataforma permite a figuras públicas detectar y solicitar la remoción de contenido deepfake creado con IA.
bajada_en: YouTube expanded its AI deepfake monitoring feature to celebrities. The platform allows public figures to detect and request removal of AI-generated deepfake content.

title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
summary: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.
title_es: Sam Altman critica modelo de ciberseguridad de Anthropic
bajada: El CEO de OpenAI, Sam Altman, criticó a Mythos, el nuevo modelo de ciberseguridad de Anthropic, acusando a la compañía de usar 'marketing basado en miedo'. La crítica refleja la competencia creciente entre OpenAI y Anthropic.
bajada_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman criticized Anthropic's new Mythos cybersecurity model, accusing the company of 'fear-based marketing'. The critique reflects growing competition between OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: Celebrities will be able to find and request removal of AI deepfakes on YouTube
summary: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake monitoring feature to Hollywood - meaning some celebrity AI videos could soon disappear. The platform's likeness detection feature searches YouTube for AI deepfake content and flags it for public figures enrolled in the program. Public figures can use it to keep track of AI content on YouTube of themselves […]
title_es: Cheat de Roblox y herramienta de IA derribaron plataforma Vercel
bajada: Una combinación inusual de un cheat de Roblox y una herramienta de IA causó una caída importante en la plataforma Vercel. El incidente subraya vulnerabilidades inesperadas en infraestructura cuando se combinan diferentes tipos de ataques.
bajada_en: An unusual combination of a Roblox cheat and an AI tool caused a major outage on the Vercel platform. The incident highlights unexpected vulnerabilities in infrastructure when different attack types combine.
